must.title: Input has combobox role
must.description: The text input element must have role="combobox"

must.title: aria-expanded reflects popup state
must.description: The combobox element must have aria-expanded="true" when the popup is visible and aria-expanded="false" when hidden

must.title: Combobox references its popup
must.description: The combobox must have aria-controls pointing to the id of the listbox or other popup element

must.title: Declare autocomplete behaviour
must.description: Set aria-autocomplete to "none", "list", "inline", or "both" to describe how suggestions are presented

must.title: Arrow keys navigate the popup
must.description: Down Arrow opens the popup and moves focus to the first option; Up/Down Arrow move between options

must.title: Escape closes popup
must.description: Pressing Escape must close the popup without changing the input value

should.title: Use aria-activedescendant for option focus
should.description: When focus stays on the input while navigating, set aria-activedescendant to the id of the highlighted option

should.title: Enter selects focused option
should.description: Pressing Enter should select the currently highlighted option and close the popup

should.title: Visible label for the combobox
should.description: Provide a <label> element or aria-label so the purpose of the combobox is clear

avoid.title: Mouse-only popup interaction
avoid.description: Don't require mouse clicks to open or select from the popup — all options must be reachable by keyboard

avoid.title: Trapping focus inside the popup
avoid.description: Don't trap keyboard focus inside the listbox — Tab should close the popup and move focus to the next element

react.label: React Combobox (select-only)

html.label: HTML Combobox
html.code:
• Apple
  • Banana

tests.title: Keyboard Open and Select
steps: Press Down Arrow — popup should open
Press Down/Up Arrow to navigate options
Press Enter to select — popup should close and input should update

tests.title: Escape Dismiss
steps: Open the popup via Down Arrow
Verify popup closes and focus returns to the input

tests.title: Screen Reader Announcement
steps: Verify it is announced as a combobox with expanded/collapsed state
Open and navigate options; verify each option name and selected state is read
